dimensions.overall_hydraulic_line_height: 12 ft (3.66 m) standard, adjustable to accommodate any ceiling height or routed in shop floor

installation_requirements.concrete_floor_requirements: 4000 PSI (27586.2 kPa) mix, 4-1/2 inch (11.43 cm) depth
installation_requirements.anchoring_system: 16 bolts, 3/4 inch x 5 inch (1.90 x 12.7 cm)

specifications.address: P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Ave, Amsterdam, NY 12010
specifications.synchronization: Hydraulic fluid displacement using no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
specifications.steel_carriage_bearings: 8 per carriage, double-sealed, self lubricating (16 total)
specifications.mechanical_safety_locks: Automatic, all position, starting at 3 inches (7.62 cm) off the floor
specifications.warranty: 5 years, plus limited lifetime cylinder seal warranty
